name: webull-openapi
description: Public Codex skills for the Webull Thailand OpenAPI, with catalog-driven requests and explicit write safety gates.

interface.longDescription: Six focused skills cover Webull authentication, read-only data, account reads, guarded watchlist and order writes, and streaming-event documentation.
defaultPrompt: Get a Webull market snapshot for AAPL.
Preview a Webull order without placing it.
